# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment artifacts generated during analysis.

- [Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md) — High-level application architecture and component relationships.
- [Dependency Map](dependency-map.md) — External dependency inventory grouped by functional category.
- [API & Service Communication Contracts](api-service-contracts.md) — Endpoint inventory and service communication patterns.
- [Data Architecture & Persistence Layer](data-architecture.md) — Database configuration, entity model, and repository patterns.
- [Configuration & Externalized Settings Inventory](configuration-inventory.md) — Profiles, properties, secrets, and runtime configuration details.
- [Core Business Workflows](business-workflows.md) — Primary domain workflows and decision logic.
